title: abrotanella spathulata
intro: Abrotanella spathulata, also known as New Zealand pepperwort, is a small perennial herb native to New Zealand. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it a useful treatment for minor wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Abrotanella spathulata include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Abrotanella spathulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
